# seoslug Documentation

> Modern Python SEO toolkit — generate Open Graph, Twitter Cards, JSON-LD, canonical, and robots metadata in pure Python.

## Overview
- [seoslug](https://seoslug.emiliano-go.com/): Python SEO toolkit with hooks, payloads, and per-route metadata
- [Installation](https://seoslug.emiliano-go.com/installation/): Install seoslug via pip with fast or light extras
- [Getting Started](https://seoslug.emiliano-go.com/getting-started/): Quickstart guide — SEOConfig, SEOEntity, build_seo_payload

## Core Concepts
- [Payload](https://seoslug.emiliano-go.com/payload/): The SEOPayload dataclass with to_dict(), render_html(), hash(), etag()
- [Configuration](https://seoslug.emiliano-go.com/configuration/): SEOConfig reference — all fields, defaults, and validation
- [Entities](https://seoslug.emiliano-go.com/entities/): SEOEntity types — page, article, profile, product, home
- [Hooks](https://seoslug.emiliano-go.com/hooks/): Pre/post-processing pipeline with global and scoped registries
- [URL Policy](https://seoslug.emiliano-go.com/url-policy/): URL normalization — trailing slashes, HTTPS enforcement, case

## Metadata Reference
- [Open Graph](https://seoslug.emiliano-go.com/open-graph/): og:title, og:description, og:image, og:type, og:url, og:site_name
- [Twitter Cards](https://seoslug.emiliano-go.com/twitter-cards/): twitter:card, twitter:site, twitter:title, twitter:description, twitter:image
- [Schema.org JSON-LD](https://seoslug.emiliano-go.com/schema-org/): Auto-generated WebPage, Article, Product, Profile schemas
- [Canonical URLs](https://seoslug.emiliano-go.com/canonical/): Canonical link tags with URL policy normalization
- [Robots](https://seoslug.emiliano-go.com/robots/): Per-route robots directives — index, follow, noarchive, nosnippet

## Integrations
- [Zensical](https://seoslug.emiliano-go.com/integrations/zensical/): Inline Markdown extension for Zensical docs sites
- [Hugo](https://seoslug.emiliano-go.com/integrations/hugo/): Pre-build script + head partial for Hugo projects
- [Quartz](https://seoslug.emiliano-go.com/integrations/quartz/): Pre-build script + Head.tsx modification for Quartz
- [Flask](https://seoslug.emiliano-go.com/integrations/flask/): Jinja2 templates, route decorators, JSON API, ETag headers
- [Starlette](https://seoslug.emiliano-go.com/integrations/starlette/): Async endpoints, middleware, Jinja2Templates, JSON API
- [FastAPI](https://seoslug.emiliano-go.com/integrations/fastapi/): FastAPI + Starlette async patterns, dependency injection
- [Django](https://seoslug.emiliano-go.com/integrations/django/): Django template tags, middleware, management commands
- [SSG](https://seoslug.emiliano-go.com/integrations/ssg/): Pre-build script pattern for any static site generator

## Reference
- [CLI Reference](https://seoslug.emiliano-go.com/cli/): seoslug CLI commands — generate, validate, inspect
- [Changelog](https://seoslug.emiliano-go.com/changelog/): Release history and version notes

For the full documentation in a single file, see [llms-full.txt](https://seoslug.emiliano-go.com/llms-full.txt).
